Onboarding.step1Body: Type a keyword in the top-left search — e.g. «register dog», «passport» or «social aid». You'll instantly see the responsible office.
Onboarding.step2Body: The «Machinery» tab shows the whole administration as a network. Hover highlights a unit and its connections, click pins the selection and opens the detail panel.
Onboarding.step3Body: The «Tax franc» tab shows where your money goes — each department as an area, larger = more spending. Click a department to zoom in.

Wirkung.title: Impact & Maturity
Wirkung.intro: Figures derived from the modelled processes and life events — without tracking. They show how digital and how simple the procedures are today and where simplification can start.
Wirkung.source: Derived from process and life-event data
Wirkung.privacyNote: Computed purely from existing data — no usage or personal data.
Wirkung.klimaProvenance: The per-department CO₂ values are indicative estimates; the net-zero target is the official city goal.
Wirkung.kompassIntro: Aggregated across all processes — structural features of the model, not legally binding information.

Territory.title: Locations
Territory.intro: City locations on the map. Pick a category.
Territory.noLayer: No layer selected – pick at least one category above.

Nav.skipToList: Skip to textual overview (for screen readers)

Search.label: Search for an office or a concern
Search.help: Type a search term. Suggestions appear below. Enter opens the full results page. Esc clears the search.
Search.showAll: Show all results on a dedicated page →
Search.noMatchesHint: Did you mean one of these?
Search.missNote: Anonymous search terms without results help us spot missing topics. We don't store any personal data.

Feedback.question: Was this information helpful?
Feedback.commentPlaceholder: Optional: briefly describe — no personal data.
Feedback.privacy: Please don't enter personal data. We don't store names, email or IP addresses; emails and longer numbers are removed automatically.

Roadmap.title: Roadmap
Roadmap.intro: What happens to feedback and suggestions — by status, from the public GitHub issues. No names or personal data.

Explorer.intro: Search for an office or browse the departments. Tap an entry for details.
Explorer.resultsCount: {count, plural, one {# result} other {# results}} for “{query}”
Explorer.noResults: No results. Try a different term.

Anliegen.title: Search citizen concerns
Anliegen.intro: Search for terms like «register dog», «passport», «social aid» or «electricity». This page works without JavaScript — it is the fallback for the live search at the top left.
Anliegen.noResults: No results for „{query}". Try another term — for example single keywords like «tax», «water» or «care».
Anliegen.resultsCount: {count, plural, one {# result} other {# results}} for „{query}"
Anliegen.placeholder: e.g. register dog, passport, social aid…

Treemap.title: Where does my tax franc go?
Treemap.intro: Expenses {jahr} by department and division. Area = expense. Click on a department to zoom in.
Treemap.emptyBody: No office has recorded expenses yet. Try the {listLink} instead, or use the {searchLink}.
Treemap.hiddenDepartments: {count, plural, one {# department is} other {# departments are}} not shown — no budget data available for: {names}.
Treemap.committeeNote: Tip: Dashed lines indicate departments where the parliamentary audit committee differs from the organizational assignment.

List.title: {cityName} administration – hierarchical overview
List.intro: This list shows the same data as the graphical diagram tab in semantically structured form for screen readers and keyboard navigation. Use Tab to navigate the hierarchy, Enter to expand or collapse nodes.
List.noBudget: No budget data recorded for this office yet.

Detail.ariaLabel: Detail information about the selected administrative unit
Detail.perCapitaTitle: Expense per capita — expense divided by the city's resident population
Detail.budgetShareTitle: Share of this item in the city's total expense

Hint: Hover = explore · Click = select · Scroll = zoom · Search also knows concerns

Simulator.title: Budget simulator: what if?
Simulator.intro: Shift funds between departments and see immediately how the city's total budget and per-resident burden would change. Pure simulation — no impact on the real financial data.
Simulator.departmentsHeading: Departments — move the sliders to adjust expenses
Simulator.disclaimer: Note: this simulator is for illustration only. Real budget decisions sit with the city council — and are far more complex (legal commitments, fixed costs, follow-on effects, political majorities).
Simulator.empty: No department budget data available — the simulator needs per-department expense figures.

BudgetSummary.aufwandTitle: Gross expense of the city — sum of all department expenses; in parentheses the per-resident figure.
BudgetSummary.nettoTitle: Net expense (expense minus income) — the amount taxpayers effectively fund; in parentheses the per-resident figure.

Prozesse.title: Administrative processes
Prozesse.intro: Typed flowcharts following the OpenGov-Process-Schema. Each process shows steps and involved actors — so residents can see what a procedure actually entails.

kompass.heading: Process compass
kompass.intro: Structural diagnosis of this procedure — derived from the model, not legally binding information.
kompass.geteiltHint: several bodies involved, often opaque for citizens
kompass.pflichtdokumente: {count, plural, one {# required document} other {# required documents}}
kompass.entscheidungen: {count, plural, one {# decision point} other {# decision points}}
kompass.verbesserungen: {count, plural, one {# improvement idea} other {# improvement ideas}}

Prozesse.filterLeer: No processes with this online maturity.
Prozesse.disclaimer: Übersetzung ausstehend — Inoffizielle, vereinfachte Darstellung — keine amtliche Auskunft. Massgeblich sind allein die verlinkten Quellen der Stadt Zürich (siehe Quellen mit Abrufdatum).
Prozesse.disclaimerHochrisiko: Übersetzung ausstehend — Hochrisiko-Fall mit rechtlicher Tragweite: Hier geht es um verbindliche Fristen, Gebühren oder Rechtsmittel mit erheblichen Folgen. Diese Darstellung ist inoffiziell und vereinfacht — rechtlich verbindlich sind allein die amtlichen Quellen der Stadt Zürich. Prüfen Sie verbindliche Angaben dort und holen Sie im Zweifel persönliche Beratung ein.
Prozesse.referenzenHint: Übersetzung ausstehend — Verbindliche Zahlen stehen bewusst nicht im Diagramm — sie gelten nur so, wie sie in der amtlichen Quelle stehen. Jeder Eintrag verlinkt auf die exakte Stelle.
Prozesse.referenzUnverifiziert: Übersetzung ausstehend — Belegstelle noch nicht wörtlich übernommen
Prozesse.translationPending: Translation pending — content is shown in German.

bewertung.heading: Assessment: digitalisation & user-centricity
bewertung.intro: Derived metadata — not an authoritative statement. Each indicator is either deterministically computed from the process model or evidenced from the official source. Without evidence or derivation an indicator stays "unknown" — it is never guessed.
bewertung.unbekanntHinweis: {count, plural, one {# indicator unknown} other {# indicators unknown}} — not assessed for lack of evidence (not counted as "not met").

evidenz.unbekanntText: No evidence on file — flagged as unknown, not as not met.

berechnet.leichte-sprache: {zahl} of {von} texts (title + steps) in easy language
berechnet.voraussetzungen-genannt: {zahl, plural, =0 {no preconditions stated} one {# precondition stated} other {# preconditions stated}}
berechnet.fristen-kosten-verlinkt: {zahl, plural, =0 {no linked source} one {# linked source for binding values} other {# linked sources for binding values}}

kennzahl.akteurswechsel: {count, plural, one {# actor handover} other {# actor handovers}}
kennzahl.pflichtdokumente: {count, plural, one {# required document} other {# required documents}}
kennzahl.entscheidungspunkte: {count, plural, one {# decision point} other {# decision points}}

Quartier.title: Spatial Distribution
Quartier.intro: Figures per city district: area from the district geometry and the number of public facilities (Open Data Zürich). Data quality is shown in the badge.
Quartier.noData: No facility data yet for this metric — load it with `npm run data:fetch-geo`.

Portfolio.title: Portfolio: processes × dimensions
Portfolio.intro: The big picture across all processes: one procedure per row, one indicator for digitalisation or user-orientation per column, colour shows the degree of fulfilment. Derived metadata — not an authoritative statement. Every cell links to the process and its evidence.
Portfolio.privacyNote: Generated deterministically from the existing process data — no usage or personal data, no invented values to fill gaps.
Portfolio.caption: Heatmap: processes (rows) × indicators (columns)
Portfolio.legendInformativ: informational (yes/no, does not count towards the score)
Portfolio.detailLink: Go to process “{titel}” — details and evidence
Portfolio.belegLueckeTitle: No digitalisation evidence on file yet — the digital columns stay “unknown”, not “not fulfilled”.
Portfolio.coverageNote: {ohne, plural, =0 {All {total} processes have substantiated digitalisation indicators.} one {# of {total} processes has no substantiated digitalisation indicators yet — the digital columns stay “unknown”, not “not fulfilled”.} other {# of {total} processes have no substantiated digitalisation indicators yet — the digital columns stay “unknown”, not “not fulfilled”.}}
